steps.assistant_text: 41-insn -O0 size-allocator state update. Lifted from 99.88% to 100% via if/else fall-through merge (replacing 'if (==0) {store; return}' early-return). Both arms now converge on shared a0[13] = a1 store before epilogue, eliminating the 1-byte branch-displacement diff. Recipe documented at docs/PATTERNS.md#feedback-drop-early-return-to-fall-through-to-merge-stmt.
